---
title: "Overview and Trends at Major Reservoirs"
author: "Colorado River Data Mapping Project"
format: html
---

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// Load elevation data
Res_Elv = await d3.csv("Data/Reservoir_Elevation.csv")
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// Reservoir selector
viewof reservoir_choice = Inputs.select(
  ["Lake Mead", "Lake Powell"],
  { label: "Reservoir:", value: "Mead" }
)

// Filter data based on selection
filtered = reservoir_choice === "Mead"
  ? Res_Elv
  : Res_Elv.filter(d => d.Reservoir === reservoir_choice)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

Plot.lineY(filtered, {x: "Year", y: "Elevation"}).plot({y: {grid: true}})
```
